home.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about renting with us.

faqs.q: What is included in the rental price?
faqs.a: The rental rate includes first-class insurance, unlimited kilometres, 24-hour breakdown cover, additional drivers, and all taxes.

faqs.q: Do I have to pay immediately when booking?
faqs.a: No, you can book now and pay on collection.

faqs.q: Do I need to pay a deposit?
faqs.a: Yes, a 5,000 THB cash deposit is required upon vehicle collection.
You can cancel your booking at any time free of charge.
